subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1914-12-19
subcodes.first_line: His Holiness Christ on account of the avocation of His disciples called them the fisher of men but the Blessed Perfection designated
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @spiritual transformation, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @symbolism, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
